fixes.description: Upgrade github/codeql-action from v3 (Node 20) to v4 (Node 24) to remove deprecation warning.
Add pre-run step to remove stale CodeQL database artifacts and free disk space.
Set upload: failure-only to prevent SARIF rejection when GitHub default setup is also enabled.
Replace raw str(e) in FastAPI HTTPException detail fields with generic messages; log internally.
Add bleach==6.1.0 to requirements.txt as the approved HTML sanitisation library.
